name: aegis
description: AEGIS v12.3 — Autonomous E-commerce Growth Intelligence System • 225 Agents • 17 Modules

scripts.dev: docker-compose up -d postgres redis && concurrently "cd backend && npm run dev" "cd workers && npm run dev"
scripts.build: cd backend && npm run build && cd ../workers && npm run build
scripts.migrate:all: for f in migrations/*.sql; do echo "Running $f..."; psql $DATABASE_URL < $f; done
scripts.migrate:v12: for f in migrations/047_*.sql migrations/048_*.sql migrations/049_*.sql migrations/050_*.sql migrations/051_*.sql migrations/052_*.sql migrations/053_*.sql; do echo "Running $f..."; psql $DATABASE_URL < $f; done
